decision.summary: No open position needs management, and no new trade is allowed without a new Beecthor video.
decision.rationale: There are no existing BTC positions to close or reduce. Recent transcripts and summaries still imply a macro-bearish thesis after a rebound/squeeze, and Binance at 67900.12 shows that rebound has extended, so some weekly markets look directionally interesting; however, the binding playbook says 'No new Beecthor video means no bet,' and the provided context includes no new 2026-03-30 Beecthor transcript/video. Under the playbook, that forces NO_ACTION. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
